REMITTITUR FILED ORDER IN RE DISMISSAL OF APPEAL. A MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT HAS NOT BEEN FILED IN THE UNLIMITED JURISDICTION WITHIN 10 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF DEFAULT. THEREFORE, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO RULE 133C.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TWO WOMEN SAN FRANCISCO,INC/CORP--RESPONDENT THE PLAINTIFF, CATHERINE BIRK, TAKE NOTHING BY REASON OF HER APPEAL FROM THAT CERTAIN ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER DATED FEBRUARY 19, 1998 ON FILE HEREIN. THIS JUDGMENT SHALL ACT AS AN ADJUDICATION ON THE MERITS. THE DEFENDANT, TWO WOMEN SAN FRANCISCO, INC. SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER ITS COSTS AND REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES INCURRED IN ACCORDANCE WITH LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2(B). COURT COSTS $88.00, ATTORNEY'S FEES $3904.90 TOTAL AMOUNT OF COSTS $ 3992.90
